S.FORM: Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah I 1946 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brunei anini i ci Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, patirengan a romi'ad i 1967 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 5 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: ƒßaji ƒßassana…æ b~b~vo~u…ækiaƒß mo~u~u °i**a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æin wa…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æao~u~u…æaƒß i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ƒßaji ƒßassana…æ b~b~vo~u…ækiaƒß mo~u~u °i**a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æin wa…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æao~u~u…æaƒß, ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vro~u~un…ôi anini i ¶i ƒßaji ƒßassana…æ b~b~vo~u…ækiaƒß mo~u~u °i**a…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æin wa…¨~…Æ…¨~…Æao~u~u…æaƒß, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah I 1946 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brunei anini i ci Haji Hassanal Bolkiah Mu'izzaddin Waddaulah, patirengan a romi'ad i 1967 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 5 a romi'ad.
